Home base

Can Taika, our villa in the pines

Tucked into the Mediterranean forest of Sant Josep de Sa Talaia with sweeping views over the Bay of San Antonio — 7 bedrooms, a 9×4m saltwater infinity pool, a 180m² rooftop solarium, and beaches just 5 minutes away.

🛏️ 7 bedrooms · 6 baths 🏊 9×4m infinity pool 🌅 180m² rooftop solarium 🔥 Covered BBQ & outdoor kitchen 🚐 10 transfers included 📺 4 Smart TVs · Google Home 🧘 Yoga terrace 🅿️ Parking ×4

The itinerary

Five days, one legend sent off in style

Beach days, a day at sea, two legendary Pacha nights, and home-cooked dinners by Chelo at the villa.

At the stove

Meet Chelo

The man behind the dinners. Chelo Radonjic is a private chef who cooks for celebrities across the world — equally at home in the kitchens of Ibiza and Punta del Este. He'll be feeding the crew at the villa on Thursday, Saturday and Sunday.

Expect long, sun-soaked lunches and proper sit-down dinners on the terrace — fresh local produce, the catch of the day, and a table that turns into the best seat on the island. And don't let the apron fool you: once service is done, Chelo is as much a party animal as anyone on this trip.

👨‍🍳 Chef to celebrities 🌴 Ibiza & Punta del Este 🍽️ Dinners Thu · Sat · Sun 🎉 Certified party guy

"Cooking is just the warm-up — the real menu starts after dessert."

Friday · Day at sea

The Lagoon 450

Our chartered catamaran for Friday — a 45-foot Lagoon flybridge cat with vast sun decks, a shaded cockpit and a swim platform. We'll cruise the Bay of San Antonio, anchor in the calas, and swim straight off the back before the night kicks off at Pacha.

Length
45 ft
Beam
7.9 m
Layout
Flybridge
Onboard
The whole crew
Lagoon 450 · Friday 12 June

The island

Calas of impossible blue

Some of Ibiza's most beautiful beaches sit minutes from Can Taika. These are the views — and the turquoise water — waiting on Saturday's beach day.

5 min away

Cala Comte

Crystal-clear shallows and the island's most famous sunset, facing the islets of Conillera and Es Bosc.

5 min away

Cala Bassa

A wide arc of white sand backed by pines — calm, family-friendly water perfect for a long lazy afternoon.

Walkable

Port des Torrent

The closest cove of all — stroll down for a swim, or push on to Cala Tarida's golden sands nearby.

After dark

Two nights at Pacha

The reason half of us said yes. Friday belongs to Marco Carola, Sunday to Solomun — both at the legendary Pacha Ibiza, doors 23:00 till 06:00.
